auth.signInTitle: Sign in to the config console

notFound.title: 404 · Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or may have moved.

header.layoutHelp: Adjust the desktop layout for different screens and working styles.
header.layoutBothAdjustable: Expand with adjustable sidebar and content

groups.selectHint: Select a group on the right
groups.configUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid https URL.
groups.configUrlTypeHint: The URL must point to a .json file.
groups.confirmDelete:
Delete group “{label}”?
This will also delete its sub-groups and rules.

entries.description: Edit redirects rules in this group
entries.emptyTitle: No rules in this group yet
entries.emptyHint: Click the button to add one

editor.tipParse: Tip: Switching back to Rules will use the parsed content.

routeEntry.noRuleItems: No rule items yet. Click the button below to add one.
routeEntry.typeTooltip:
prefix: Prefix matching
exact: Exact path matching
proxy: Reverse proxy
routeEntry.targetTooltip:
Supports target, to, url fields
Functionally identical
routeEntry.priorityTooltip:
Matching Priority
Smaller number = higher priority
routeEntry.analyticsIdTooltip: Stable identifier used to attribute requests after a path or target changes.

page.title: Short-link analytics
page.description: Understand matched requests without storing IP addresses, full referrers, query strings, or user-agent strings.

detail.title: Short-link details
detail.description: Request activity and privacy-preserving dimensions for this tracked link.

metrics.title: Key metrics
metrics.humanClicksDescription: Estimated browser-like navigation requests matched to links
metrics.entryHumanClicksDescription: Estimated browser-like navigations excluding controlled continuation hops
metrics.totalRequestsDescription: All requests matched to tracked links
metrics.entryRequestsDescription: Requests excluding verified short-link continuation hops
metrics.declaredBotShareDescription: Requests whose clients identify as bots or preview agents
metrics.suspectedAutomationShareDescription: Requests classified as likely automated, not confirmed bots
metrics.errorsDescription: Matched requests ending in an observed error

trend.title: Request trend
trend.description: Human clicks compared with all observed requests.
trend.empty: No requests were observed in this period.
trend.accessibleTitle: Human clicks and total requests over time

ranking.title: Top short links
ranking.description: Ranked by human clicks in the selected period.
ranking.empty: No tracked links have data for this period.
ranking.tableCaption: Short links ranked by human clicks

quality.title: Data quality
quality.description: Coverage and known limits for interpreting these figures.
quality.humanClickNote: Estimated human navigations exclude declared bots, suspected automation, and link previews.
quality.cacheNote: Cached permanent redirects may not produce a new edge request for every browser visit.

states.unconfiguredDescription: Add the database and analytics environment variables, then run the analytics migration to start collecting requests.
states.emptyDescription: Requests will appear after the runtime emits its first signed analytics events.
states.linkEmptyTitle: No requests for this link yet
states.linkEmptyDescription: This link is tracked, but no matching requests were observed in the selected period.
states.notFoundDescription: The analytics ID does not exist or is no longer available.
states.errorDescription: The data service returned an unexpected error. You can retry without losing any changes.

trend.title: Automation trend
trend.description: Estimated declared-bot and suspected-automation requests over time.
trend.accessibleTitle: Declared-bot and suspected-automation requests over time

ranking.title: Links most visited by automation
ranking.description: Tracked links ranked by estimated declared-bot and suspected-automation requests.
ranking.empty: No automated visits to tracked links were observed in this period.
ranking.tableCaption: Tracked links ranked by automated requests

breakdowns.title: Automation classification
breakdowns.description: Bars use estimated values with observed counts shown below. Suspected automation is not a confirmed bot.

states.emptyDescription: Declared bots, suspected automation, and unmatched requests will appear after the runtime reports them.
